scripts.install:all: bun install && bun --cwd=client install && bun --cwd=server install
scripts.install:all:bun: bun install && bun --cwd=client install && bun --cwd=server install
scripts.install:all:node: npm ci && npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix server ci
scripts.lockfiles:refresh: bun install && npm install --package-lock-only && bun --cwd=client install && npm --prefix client install --package-lock-only && bun --cwd=server install && npm --prefix server install --package-lock-only
scripts.dev:node: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev:node" "npm --prefix client run dev" --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "green,blue"
scripts.start: bun run build:bun && bun --cwd=server run start:unified:bun
scripts.start:bun: bun run build:bun && bun --cwd=server run start:unified:bun
scripts.start:node: npm run build:node && npm --prefix server run start:unified:node
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.services:science: docker compose --profile science up -d gromacs-api glioblastoma-predictor
